VAL-CLI-007.evidence: Command `totus metrics get sleep_score --from 2026-01-01 --to 2026-01-31` returned 31 daily data points with values 60-92 from oura source. ENCRYPTION_KEY mismatch resolved by re-seeding data for mock_test_totus_dev.
VAL-CLI-007.details: Re-seeded 720 daily data points, 4032 series points, 56 period events for mock_test_totus_dev with current ENCRYPTION_KEY. Health data endpoint returns data successfully via API key auth.

VAL-CLI-013.evidence: Fixed CLI bug: changed `/api/connections/${conn.provider}/sync` to `/api/connections/${conn.id}/sync` in both --all and single-ID code paths. `connections sync --all` now returns '✓ Sync triggered for 1 connections' with oura → queued. `connections sync <uuid>` also works. Verified fix with both table and JSON output formats.
VAL-CLI-013.details: Root cause was CLI using provider name ('oura') instead of connection UUID in sync URL. Fix applied in packages/cli/src/commands/connections.ts. Unit test updated from /api/connections/oura/sync to /api/connections/conn-1/sync. All 143 CLI tests pass.

VAL-CLI-014.evidence: Fixed CLI bug: preferences list now unwraps `response.data.preferences` when API returns `{data: {preferences: [...]}}` format. Full flow verified: `preferences set hrv oura` → success, `preferences list` → shows table with hrv → oura row, `preferences delete hrv` → cleared, `preferences list` → 'No source preferences set'.
VAL-CLI-014.details: Root cause was `Array.isArray(response.data)` returning false for `{preferences: [...]}` object. Fixed in packages/cli/src/commands/preferences.ts to check both array and nested object formats. Unit tests updated to mock API response shape correctly (data.preferences array).

VAL-CLI-017.evidence: Export endpoint returns 200 with full JSON including profile, connections (1 oura), health_data (720 daily points), shares, and audit events. File export writes 178KB JSON. ENCRYPTION_KEY mismatch resolved by re-seeding.
VAL-CLI-017.details: Previously failed because health data encrypted with different ENCRYPTION_KEY couldn't be decrypted. After re-seeding with current key, export works for both direct API calls and CLI command.

summary: All 4 previously failed assertions now pass. Two were fixed by re-seeding data with current ENCRYPTION_KEY (VAL-CLI-007, VAL-CLI-017). Two were fixed by correcting CLI-side bugs: connections sync URL now uses conn.id instead of conn.provider (VAL-CLI-013), and preferences list now unwraps nested response format (VAL-CLI-014). All 143 CLI unit tests pass.
